heading.purpose: Page titles, section headers. 600 weight, -0.015em tracking.

body.purpose: All prose, descriptions, form labels. 16px minimum, max 65ch.

caption.purpose: Badge text, metadata, timestamps. 12px, positive tracking.

mono.purpose: Order IDs. Tabular figures for alignment.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: All cards and popovers at rest.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Cards on hover, combined with -2px vertical lift.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Blue fill, white text, 12px/24px padding, 1px hover lift, full state coverage.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #2563EB; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Montserrat, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 150ms, background-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 40%); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent icon button. 44px touch target, muted bg on hover, focus ring.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Shopping cart"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { width: 44px; height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 260); border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.003 250); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 40%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: 4:5 image, title, price (tabular-nums), always-visible Add button. 2px hover lift.
components.css: .ds-card-product { border-radius: 12px; background: #fff; border: 0.5px solid oklch(0 0 0 / 6%); box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 6%), 0 1px 2px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 4%); overflow: hidden; transition: transform 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-card-product:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 8%); } .ds-card-product-img { aspect-ratio: 4/5; background: oklch(0.95 0.003 250); } .ds-card-product-body { padding: 12px 8px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-card-product-title { font-family: Montserrat; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-clamp: 2; } .ds-card-product-price { font-family: Montserrat; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-card-product { transition: none; } .ds-card-product:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. 44px height, muted border, primary focus ring, accessible label.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-input-label { font-family: Montserrat; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 260); } .ds-input { height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.01 250); border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; font-family: Montserrat; font-size: 16px; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 260); transition: border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 15%); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.42 0.01 260); }

components.name: Category Pill
components.description: Rounded-full filter chip. Active fills with primary blue. Bordered at rest.
components.css: .ds-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.01 250); background: #fff; font-family: Montserrat; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.18 0.02 260); cursor: pointer; transition: all 150ms; } .ds-pill:hover { background: oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 10%); color: #2563EB; border-color: oklch(0.55 0.18 250 / 30%); } .ds-pill-active { background: #2563EB; color: #fff; border-color: #2563EB; } .ds-pill-active:hover { background: oklch(0.55 0.18 250); color: #fff; }

components.name: Stock Badge
components.description: Three-tier stock indicator with semantic colors and matching icons.
components.html: In StockOnly 3 left
components.css: .ds-badge-stock { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Montserrat; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .ds-badge-success { background: oklch(0.55 0.12 145 / 10%); color: oklch(0.55 0.12 145); } .ds-badge-warning { background: oklch(0.7 0.1 80 / 15%); color: oklch(0.55 0.08 80); }

narrative.overview: SimpleStore is a reference architecture, not a real brand. The interface earns trust through clarity: every interaction hits a real backend, every component uses shared tokens, every page loads without decorative theater. Clean, functional, and trustworthy — the interface proves the patterns work by being invisible enough to read the code behind them. The system uses a single sans-serif family (Montserrat) at a fixed-rem scale. One blue accent carries primary actions and current selection. The palette is Restrained: tinted cool neutrals with the accent on ≤10% of any given screen. No glassmorphism, no grain overlays, no orchestrated motion. What remains after stripping all decoration is the architecture itself — and that is the point.
keyCharacteristics: Single sans family, fixed rem scale for product UI predictability
Restrained blue accent on primary actions only (≤10% per screen)
Flat-by-default surfaces; shadows tinted with the brand hue, never pure black
State-driven motion only (100–350ms); no choreographed sequences
12 reusable components built on shadcn/ui primitives
Full dark mode with independently-verified contrast
WCAG AA: skip link, focus rings, tabular-nums, 44px touch targets

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue is the only call-to-action color. Warm amber is decorative only — never on a CTA, link, or interactive element.

rules.name: The Price Neutrality Rule
rules.body: Prices use foreground (Ink), not green or primary. Green implies sale. Only sale prices use destructive red.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Everything is Montserrat. Hierarchy from weight and size, not font changes. No serif pairing.

rules.name: The Fixed Scale Rule
rules.body: Fixed rem values, not fluid clamp(). Only hero headline scales with breakpoints.

rules.name: The Tabular Money Rule
rules.body: All monetary values use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums to prevent layout shift.

rules.name: The Tinted Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow carries the primary blue hue (250), never pure black at low opacity.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state change.

dos: Do use design tokens for every color — no hard-coded hex or Tailwind color names
Do use Montserrat as the only font family on the page
Do use font-semibold (600) for headings, font-medium (500) for labels, font-normal (400) for body
Do tint all shadows with the primary blue hue
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1-h3
Do use tabular-nums for all prices via [data-slot="price"]
Do provide aria-label on every icon-only button
Do use visible focus rings on all interactive elements
Do use StyledLink for button-styled links
Do use EmptyState component for all empty content areas
donts: Don't use backdrop-filter, blur, grain textures, or glassmorphism
Don't add a second accent color — amber is decorative only
Don't use font-bold (700) — semibold (600) is the maximum weight
Don't center-align hero content (except homepage hero)
Don't add orchestrated page-load animations, staggered reveals, or scroll-driven sequences
Don't use border-left or border-right >1px as colored accent stripes
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient background)
Don't invent new shared components without checking existing 12-component library
Don't use green for regular prices — green means sale
Don't ship interactive elements without hover, focus, active, and disabled states
Don't omit empty, loading, or error states from data-driven pages
Don't use e-commerce clichés: countdown timers, fake urgency, fake social proof
